title: Surgeon Vacancy at Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates:
Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates!
